narrative:
Weller Twp township has 1,236 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 38.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.6 percentage points.
